name: eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y-x
description: An ESLint plugin to apply various a11y rules to JSX templates
author: ES Tooling authors (https://github.com/es-tooling)

scripts.build: echo "No build step needed until TypeScript migration"
scripts.generate-list-of-rules: eslint-doc-generator --rule-doc-title-format prefix-name --rule-doc-section-options false --config-emoji recommended,☑️ --ignore-config flat/recommended --ignore-config flat/strict
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:js && pnpm run lint:docs
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run lint && pnpm run tests-only
scripts.test-example:flat-cjs: cd examples/flat-cjs && pnpm install && pnpm run lint
scripts.test-example:flat-esm: cd examples/flat-esm && pnpm install && pnpm run lint
scripts.test-example:legacy: cd examples/legacy && pnpm install && pnpm run lint
scripts.test:examples: pnpm run test-example:legacy && pnpm run test-example:flat-esm && pnpm run test-example:flat-cjs
